signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, targeting 100-150ms transaction finality, was confirmed via a successful governance vote, strengthening Solana's speed edge amid strong network metrics like $57B March DEX volume and 167M monthly token holders as of April 14.[1][2]  
This resolution could shift prediction markets
